stemHtml: Complete: An instrument approach procedure is a series of manoeuvres from the IAF, or where applicable from the...

options.a: beginning of an arrival route to a point for landing.
options.b: end of a departure route to a point for landing.
options.c: end of a departure route to landing, and thereafter for a missed approach.
options.d: beginning of an arrival route to a point for landing, and thereafter for a missed approach.
